REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1294 Palou Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Renee Coleman.

The sale was confirmed at $268,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.
